args.Description: "Append FAB Speed Dial CSS and responsive overrides to the end of trades.scss."
args.toolAction: "Appending FAB Speed Dial styles to trades.scss"

args.Description: "Adjust FAB Speed Dial position, shift offsets, and horizontal text placement in RTL (move text labels to the left of the button icons)."
args.Instruction: "Modify the position coordinates, shift offsets, and add flex-direction: row-reverse to place text labels to the left of icons. Change transition starting offset for text labels."
args.toolAction: "Updating FAB positioning and RTL text alignment in SCSS"

args.Description: "Update FAB container flex alignment to flex-start (which is right in RTL) and define fab-icon-wrapper to center sub-buttons vertically relative to the main FAB."
args.Instruction: "Replace flex-end alignment with flex-start, and add .fab-icon-wrapper styles inside .fab-sub-btn."

args.Description: "Modify mobile summary-bar flex layout to place the first two stats cards side-by-side (50% width) and the profit stats card on its own full-width row."
args.Instruction: "Change summary-bar under mobile query to use flex-direction: row and flex-wrap: wrap, adjusting card widths."

args.Description: "Hide pagination container on mobile views in trades.scss"
args.Instruction: "Add .pagination-container { display: none; } inside the media query before it closes at line 2759."
